case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. RODRIGO VALE SARMENTO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SARMENTO, RODRIGO VALE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO PLAINTIFF, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2020 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $50.00 SERVED JAN-06-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SARMENTO, RODRIGO VALE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODRIGO VALE SARMENTO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SARMENTO, RODRIGO VALE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
